data.title: UIUC Research Park Intern - Hardware Functional Safety
data.description: About Rivian Rivian is on a mission to keep the world adventurous forever. Role Summary Internship Term: Summer 2026 Rivian internships are experiences optimized for student candidates. We are looking for a detail-oriented Hardware Functional Safety Engineer to join our engineering team. You will focus on ISO 26262 hardware safety analysis including FTA, DFA, and FMEDA for SoCs and PCBs.
data.qualifications: Must be currently pursuing a bachelors, masters, or PhD degree in Electrical Engineering or Computer Engineering.
data.responsibilities: Support functional safety lifecycle for hardware components through FTA, DFA, and FMEDA.
